query:
ALTER TABLE payroll_batches 
  ADD COLUMN accountant_approved_by INT NULL AFTER notes,
  ADD COLUMN accountant_approved_at TIMESTAMP NULL AFTER accountant_approved_by,
  ADD COLUMN auditor_approved_by INT NULL AFTER accountant_approved_at,
  ADD COLUMN auditor_approved_at TIMESTAMP NULL AFTER auditor_approved_by,
  ADD COLUMN finance_approved_by INT NULL AFTER auditor_approved_at,
  ADD COLUMN finance_approved_at TIMESTAMP NULL AFTER finance_approved_by,
  ADD COLUMN rejected_by INT NULL AFTER approved_at,
  ADD COLUMN rejected_at TIMESTAMP NULL AFTER rejected_by,
  ADD COLUMN rejection_reason TEXT NULL AFTER rejected_at,
  ADD COLUMN rejection_stage VARCHAR(50) NULL AFTER rejection_reason;
